## Findings worth surfacing before Stage 3 / 4

| # | Finding | Severity | Carry to |
|---|---------|----------|----------|
| 1 | Figma file does NOT use Figma Variables — tokens reverse-engineered from inline values | INFO | None — handled |
| 2 | Only ONE screen present (login + signup landing); signup form / account-setup form / dashboard NOT designed | **MEDIUM** — affects scope of Stage 6 Application Design and Stage 8 Functional Design | Open Q1 of screen-flow-map.md → team lead |
| 3 | Single dark-text "zone" logo; no inverted or favicon variant | LOW | Open Q6 of screen-flow-map.md |
| 4 | Avenir is a commercial font; licensing must be confirmed | **MEDIUM** | Stage 6 (Application Design) + Stage 11 (Stack Selection) |
| 5 | Two typos in source design ("Recieved", "expeirence") | LOW | Open Q7 of screen-flow-map.md |
| 6 | Figma label "Username" conflicts with BR § 2.8 which specifies email as login identifier | LOW — UI relabeling to "Email" recommended | Open Q2 of screen-flow-map.md |
| 7 | No mobile / tablet breakpoint design provided | **MEDIUM** — BR § 2.1 requires responsive | Open Q4 of screen-flow-map.md → Codiste house defaults documented |
